events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess conveyor skirtboard gap wear at rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: skirtboard gap wear. CEMA and OSHA 1910.212. Skirtboard seals on conveyor; gap wear increases gap, can cause spillage, dust, and potential guarding/entanglement? OSHA 1910.212 general machine guarding requires point of operation guarded. Skirtboard gap wear is a worn component, installed-defective/non-compliant. At rough-complete, should be inspected. Since wear is a defect and likely non-compliant with CEMA specs and OSHA guarding (excessive gap may expose pinch points or material ejection). Need fail. Risk maybe high due to heavy industrial conveyor, spillage, entanglement, dust. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80. Value not asked 0. Sound etc default. Findings: skirtboard gap exceeds allowable wear tolerance; worn sealing/lining; potential material spillage and exposure to moving parts. Actions: inspect/measure gap, replace worn skirtboard seals, adjust to CEMA/manufacturer clearance, verify guarding. Rationale. References: CEMA, OSHA 1910.212. Need ensure JSON valid.
